faq.question: Can I display all types of massage with prices on the website?
faq.answer: Yes, a service catalog with descriptions of each massage type, duration, and price is easily added.

faq.question: How will clients book massages?
faq.answer: Built-in booking form allows selecting massage type, specialist, and convenient time — request comes to you.

faq.question: Is it suitable for a practice with multiple massage therapists?
faq.answer: Yes, you can add therapist profiles with their specializations and work experience.

faq.question: Will the practice appear in search results?
faq.answer: Yes, websites are SEO-optimized — the practice will appear in city search results.

faq.question: How much does it cost to create a massage therapy website?
faq.answer: You can create a website for free. Paid plans unlock custom domain and advanced features.

faq.question: Can I add interior photos and therapist certifications?
faq.answer: Yes, the gallery allows showing the practice interior, equipment, and therapist diplomas.

cta_mid_subtitle: AI will generate a website with service catalog and online booking — in 5 minutes.
cta_final_subtitle: Attract clients from the internet — create a website in 5 minutes without programmers.
